label: VDR-TFR-MVX
title: Persistent Machine Verification and Validation for 20x

prose.en: Persistent Machine Verification and Validation for 20x (requirement varies by certification class; see class tailorings and the class-variants payload).

a.statement: Providers of FedRAMP 20x Class A offerings SHOULD verify and validate the status of machine-based information resources at least once every month.

b.statement: Providers of FedRAMP 20x Class B offerings MUST verify and validate the status of machine-based information resources at least once every 7 days.

c.statement: Providers of FedRAMP 20x Class C offerings MUST verify and validate the status of machine-based information resources at least once every 3 days.
